Hearing On Plaintiff Tigerrisk Partners, Llc'S Ex Parte Application For An Order To Show Cause And Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar May-04-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Plaintiff Tigerrisk Partners, LLC'S Ex Parte Application For An Order To Show Cause And Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction came on for hearing before the Court on May 4, 2021.

Appearances were made by counsel for both sides via CourtCall:

Hearing held in the chambers of Judge Ethan P. Schulman. Counsel appeared by CourtCall.

At the conclusion of the ex parte hearing, the Court issues the following ruling:

The Court having considered the papers in support of and in opposition to the application, and argument presented by counsel at the hearing, denies Plaintiff Tigerrisk Partners, LLC'S Ex Parte Application For An Order To Show Cause And Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman. Clerk: Not present. Matter not reported.
